name: Intel Core i7 13700KF 13th Gen Processor
description: Intel Core i7 13700KF 13th Gen Processor What is Intel Core i7 13700KF 13th Gen Processor price in Pakistan? Intel Core i7 13700KF 13th Gen Processor price in Pakistan is Rs.92,000. This unlocked CPU features 16 cores (8 Performance + 8 Efficient) and 24 threads with boost clock speeds up to 5.4 GHz, delivering excellent performance for gaming, content creation, and multitasking tasks, and requires a discrete GPU since it has no integrated graphics.
